meta.title: PromoClock — Claude March 2026 Off-Peak Promotion Tracker
meta.description: Instantly check if you're in Claude's 2x limit off-peak window. Real-time timezone detection for the March 2026 promotion. Free, Pro, Max & Team plans.
meta.ogTitle: PromoClock — Are You in Claude's 2x Limit Window Right Now?
meta.ogDescription: Stop doing timezone math. PromoClock instantly tells you if Claude's March 2026 off-peak promotion is active in your local time.

hero.activeSubtitle: Off-peak hours — 2x message and context limits active across all Claude platforms.
hero.inactiveSubtitle: Peak hours — standard limits apply. 2X limits return soon.
hero.expiredSubtitle: The Claude March 2026 promotion ended on March 27, 2026 at 11:59 PM PT.
hero.notStartedSubtitle: The off-peak promotion begins on March 13, 2026. Check back soon.

howItWorks.title: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.subtitle: We keep it simple so you can focus on what matters — building with Claude.

steps.title: WE DETECT YOUR TIMEZONE
steps.description: The moment you open PromoClock, we read your device's timezone automatically. No setup, no configuration needed.

steps.title: WE CALCULATE IN REAL TIME
steps.description: Our engine compares your local time against Anthropic's official peak window (8 AM – 2 PM ET, weekdays) accounting for US Daylight Saving Time.

steps.title: YOU SEE YOUR STATUS INSTANTLY
steps.description: A clear, real-time display tells you whether your limits are doubled right now — plus a countdown to the next change.

eligibility.title: ELIGIBILITY
eligibility.subtitle: Check if your Claude plan qualifies for the March 2026 off-peak promotion.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: The massive user base hitting limits most often. 2x capacity is a critical opportunity to explore the platform.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: Individual professionals and power users. Especially valuable for developers using Claude Code.

plans.name: Max
plans.description: Advanced users running autonomous agents and heavy data processing. Doubled limits enable uninterrupted work on large projects.

plans.name: Team
plans.description: Small and medium business workspaces. Enhances collaborative interactions on Claude Cowork.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Enterprise plans have dedicated capacity and custom contracts, so they are excluded from this retail promotion.

eligibility.note: Off-peak bonus usage does not count against your weekly usage limits. It operates as a completely independent bonus pool.

schedule.title: GLOBAL SCHEDULE
schedule.subtitle: See when the 2x limits are active in major cities around the world. Peak hours are weekdays 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM ET (12:00 – 18:00 UTC).

faq.title: QUESTIONS ANSWERED
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Claude's March 2026 off-peak promotion.

items.question: What is the Claude March 2026 off-peak promotion?
items.answer: Anthropic launched a promotion from March 13 to March 27, 2026 that doubles message and context limits during off-peak hours. This helps distribute server load more evenly throughout the day while giving users more capacity when demand is lower.

items.question: When exactly are off-peak hours?
items.answer: Off-peak hours are all times outside of weekday 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM Eastern Time (ET). This means weekday evenings and nights, plus the entire weekend (Saturday and Sunday, 24 hours) qualify for 2x limits. Note: Since US Daylight Saving Time started on March 8, 2026, ET refers to EDT (UTC-4) during the promotion period.

items.question: What time is Claude off-peak in my timezone?
items.answer: PromoClock automatically detects your device timezone and shows your exact local peak and off-peak windows. The hero section at the top of this page displays your current status in real time.

items.question: Which Claude plans are eligible?
items.answer: Free, Pro, Max, and Team plans are all eligible. Enterprise plans are excluded because they have dedicated capacity and custom contracts.

items.question: Does off-peak usage count against my weekly limits?
items.answer: No. The extra capacity earned during off-peak hours operates as a completely independent bonus pool. It does not consume your standard weekly usage allocation.

items.question: Do I need to activate the promotion manually?
items.answer: No activation is needed. The promotion is applied automatically to all eligible plans between March 13 and March 27, 2026.

items.question: On which platforms does the 2x limit apply?
items.answer: The doubled limits apply across all Claude surfaces: the web interface at claude.ai, desktop apps (Mac and Windows), mobile apps (iOS and Android), Claude Cowork, Claude Code (terminal), and the Excel and PowerPoint add-ins.

items.question: How does US Daylight Saving Time affect the promotion?
items.answer: DST began on March 8, 2026 — five days before the promotion started. During the promotion period (March 13–27), Eastern Time is EDT (UTC-4) and Pacific Time is PDT (UTC-7). PromoClock accounts for this automatically in all calculations.

items.question: What is PromoClock and who built it?
items.answer: PromoClock was built by Onur Sendere (@onursendere on X) to help Claude users worldwide instantly understand whether they are in the off-peak promotion window. It is an independent project and is not affiliated with Anthropic.

devTools.title: DEVELOPER TOOLS
devTools.subtitle: Integrate Claude's promotion status into your workflow. API endpoint, terminal prompt, calendar sync — no browser needed.
devTools.apiDescription: A public /api/status endpoint returns real-time promotion status as JSON. Pipe it into your ZSH/Bash prompt so you see 🟢 2X or 🔴 1X right in your terminal.
devTools.calendarDescription: Download a single .ics file that adds every peak and off-peak window to your calendar — with reminders. Works with Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.
devTools.calendarFeature1: Daily off-peak / peak blocks with correct UTC times
devTools.calendarFeature3: Works with Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook
devTools.notifDescription: Enable the bell icon in the header to receive a browser notification and a gentle chime the instant Claude switches to off-peak mode. Keep PromoClock open in a background tab and never miss 2x limits again.

footer.crafted: Lovingly built with Claude in Shrewsbury, UK.
footer.digiwingsPromo: Need bespoke, GEO-optimised web solutions for your business?
